zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume des ROCHES於大約1155年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易隆蓋艾-米勒斯時，他的父親Baudoin des Roches17歲，母親Unknown16歲。他於1191年與Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1189年登記服兵役。他於1200年在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾安喬被列為seneschal (estate manager)。他去世於1222年7月15日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易享年68歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易艾庫福藍特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume des ROCHES于大约1155年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易隆蓋艾-米勒斯时，他的父亲Baudoin des Roches17岁，母亲Unknown16岁。他于1191年与Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1189年登记服兵役。他于1200年在法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾安喬被列为seneschal (estate manager)。他去世于1222年7月15日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易享年68岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易艾庫福藍特。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

variants.name: Deo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: ROCHES
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, English: locative name from Les Roches in Seine-Maritime (Normandy). In 1297 John de Roches held the manor of (East) Winterslow in Wilts (later known as Roche Court). Any of the following post-medieval bearers may alternatively belong under (2).  See also  Roche  .
2 English: variant of Roche with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Roche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Declan, Eamonn, Fergus, Fionnuala, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish (Munster) and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Roach  . Compare   Roch  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived by a rocky outcrop or crag, from Old French roche ‘rock’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the variant Laroche 2. Compare Deroche .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume des ROCHES was born about 1155, in Longué-Jumelles, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Baudoin des Roches, was 17 and his mother, Unknown, was 16. He married Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé in 1191. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1189. In 1200, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as seneschal (estate manager) in Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France. He died on 15 July 1222, in Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume des ROCHES est né environ 1155, à Longué-Jumelles, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Baudoin des Roches, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé en 1191. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1189. En 1200, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est seneschal (estate manager) à Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1222, à Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume des ROCHES um 1155 in Longué-Jumelles, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudoin des Roches 17 und seine Mutter Unknown 16. Er hat 1191 Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1189 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1200, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als seneschal (estate manager) in Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. Juli 1222 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume des ROCHES è nato il circa 1155 nel Longué-Jumelles, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Baudoin des Roches, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Unknown, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé nel 1191. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1189. Nel 1200, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come seneschal (estate manager) nel Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Morì il 15 luglio 1222, nel Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume des ROCHESが約1155年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーロングe-ジュメレスで生まれた時，父Baudoin des Rochesは17歳，母Unknownは16歳であった。1191年にMarguerite de Sablé Dame de Sabléと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1189年に兵役登録をした。1200年，46歳の時，フランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアアンジョウでの職業はseneschal (estate manager)と記録されている。彼は1222年7月15日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーで68歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーeコウフラントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume des ROCHES(이)가 대략 1155년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 론구e-j레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudoin des Roches(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1191년 Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1200년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르 앤조우에서 seneschal (estate manager)이었다. 그는 1222년 7월 15일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 e코우플랜트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume des ROCHES nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Longué-Jumelles, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Baudoin des Roches, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Unknown, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé em 1191. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1189. Em 1200, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como seneschal (estate manager) em Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1222, em Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume des ROCHES родился около 1155 г. в местности лонгуe-джумеллесь, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Baudoin des Roches было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Unknown, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé в 1191 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1189 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1200 году, в возрасте 46 лет, работал по профессии seneschal (estate manager) в местности анджоу, исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция. Он умер 15 июля 1222 г. в местности меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности eкоуфлант, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume des ROCHES nació aproximadamente 1155, en Longué-Jumelles, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Baudoin des Roches, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Unknown, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé en 1191. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1189. En 1200, a la edad de 46 años, su ocupación registrada era seneschal (estate manager) en Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Murió el 15 de julio de 1222, en Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
